metadata.title: Portal Home — Platform for home cleaning and Airbnb businesses
metadata.description: Run your team, your clients and your Airbnb properties in real time. A photo for every cleaning, GPS check-in, ratings and a client portal. Replace WhatsApp and Excel.
metadata.keywords: home cleaning software, Airbnb cleaning management, cleaning business platform, cleaner app, Airbnb turnovers, Portal Home
metadata.ogTitle: Portal Home — The platform for your cleaning business
metadata.ogDescription: Run your team, your clients and your Airbnb properties from one place. A photo for every cleaning, GPS check-in, ratings and a client portal.
metadata.ogImageAlt: Portal Home — Platform for home cleaning and Airbnb

social.trust: The platform chosen by home-cleaning and Airbnb teams across the UK, Spain and Portugal.

hero.subtitle: Run teams, buildings, quality and communication from one place — in real time, on any device.
hero.trust: 30-day free trial · No credit card · Cancel anytime
hero.audience_chip: Built for cleaning, facilities & property teams

trusted.label: The platform chosen by professional cleaning, facilities and short-let teams across UK, ES and PT.

showcase.title: An interface your team learns in minutes.
showcase.subtitle: Designed for mobile. Ready for leadership. Connected so everyone sees the same thing, in real time.
showcase.bullet_mobile_first: Mobile-first — cleaners sign in with a PIN

portals.title: Our portals.
portals.subtitle: Two specialised portals — one for home cleaning teams, another for Airbnb / short-let operations. Everything you need in one platform.
portals.supervisor_who: Shift supervisors in corporate buildings, coworking spaces and workplaces
portals.supervisor_desc: Supervisors run their shift and building from their phone: log operative attendance, send daily reports to the manager, run quality inspections, and report incidents in real time.
portals.supervisor_f2: Daily report sent to the manager
portals.supervisor_f3: Zone-by-zone quality inspections with scoring and automatic feedback
portals.supervisor_f4: Direct chat with the team and management
portals.manager_desc: The manager has full visibility into every assigned building: who's working, what inspections scored, which timesheets and supply orders are pending approval.
portals.manager_f1: Real-time view of every building and supervisor
portals.manager_f2: Approve daily reports and supply orders
portals.manager_f3: Quality stats per building and per operative
portals.operative_desc: The operative sees their assignments, schedule and floors, and can receive messages from the supervisor or manager.
portals.operative_f1: Check shift, building and assigned floors
portals.director_tag: The 360° view of the whole company
portals.director_desc: The director gets access to every building, every manager and supervisor, global quality metrics, and can export full reports.
portals.director_f1: KPI dashboard: active buildings, operatives and supervisors online
portals.director_f2: Quality stats per building and per operative
portals.director_f3: Direct chat with managers and the team
portals.hq_desc: Absolute control of the platform: users, buildings, passwords, branding, security and access.
portals.airbnb_cities: Ideal for properties in London, Madrid, Barcelona, Lisbon and any city with an active short-let market.

home.name: Home Portal
home.tagline: Your home, always spotless. Your experience, always exceptional.
home.description: A complete platform that connects your cleaning team with every client elegantly and professionally. Two worlds in one: operational management for your business and a premium experience for the client.
features: Cleaner assignment per client and date

airbnb.name: Airbnb Portal
airbnb.description: Organise and control cleaning of your Airbnb properties between guests. Each property has its own checklist, access log and an automatic report to the host when the property is ready.
features: Automatic per-property report — history, who cleaned and when
Notify the host when the property is ready for the next guest

vip.eyebrow: For your client · the VIP experience
vip.title: Feel at home…
vip.subtitle: The client gets their own digital space — elegant, intuitive, with everything under their control.
vip.chat_desc: Talk to your cleaner or the team anytime. No calls, no emails — instant messages straight from the app.
vip.feedback_desc: After every visit, the client can rate the service with one click. Feedback goes straight to the team to continuously improve.
vip.reviews_desc: A wall of real testimonials from happy clients. Total transparency that builds trust before they even sign up.
vip.refer_desc: Share a personal link with friends and family. Every referral that becomes a client earns you a perk — discount, free visit or a surprise gift.
vip.history_desc: See every past visit, the report from each cleaning and who was in your home. Complete transparency.
vip.notifications_desc: Get notified when the cleaner is on the way, when they arrive and when they finish. Always informed — no surprises.

loyalty.title: Premium Club.
loyalty.subtitle: Turn your clients into brand ambassadors.

payments.title: Charge like a modern business.
payments.subtitle: Card, Apple Pay, Google Pay and BACS. Recurring or per visit. The client controls their subscription at all times.
payments.per_visit_desc: Pay only when you receive the service
payments.invoice_desc: Receive your invoice instantly after every visit
payments.methods_desc: Credit / debit card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, BACS
payments.history_desc: Check every invoice with one click
payments.control_desc: The client controls their subscription at all times
payments.security_note: Secure payments with SSL encryption and PCI DSS compliance

testimonials.title: Trust, transparency, peace of mind.
testimonials.q1: It's like having a digital butler. I know exactly when they're coming, how my home turned out, and I can tell them in seconds.
testimonials.q2: I referred the service to three friends and got a free cleaning. Incredible!
testimonials.q3: Seeing other clients' reviews before signing up gave me all the confidence I needed.

pricing.title: Start small. Grow without switching platforms.
pricing.subtitle: Two product lines: corporate for buildings and services, and home cleaning with a premium client experience.
pricing.trial_note: 30-day free trial — no credit card. Cancel whenever.
pricing.footnote: All prices in GBP, VAT not included. Volume discounts available. Change plans anytime.

comparison.title: Home cleaning — what's included in each plan.
comparison.subtitle: Every plan includes the elegant client portal. Premium features unlock as you grow.

security.title: Enterprise security, by default.
security.subtitle: Designed from the ground up for organisations that take data, compliance and uptime seriously.
security.rbac_sub: Granular roles, SAML, OAuth, MFA enforced
security.uptime_sub: Multi-region, encrypted at rest and in transit

install.q: Do I need to install anything?
install.a: No. It's 100% web — works on any modern phone, computer or tablet. The cleaner opens the URL, signs in with a 6-digit PIN and they're in.

import.q: Can I import my existing data?
import.a: Yes. You can upload your clients, properties and team from a CSV file or add them directly from the dashboard. We'll help you set up if you need it.

offline.a: Yes. The cleaner can check in and upload photos even if the house has no internet; everything syncs the moment they're back online. Nothing is lost.

branding.q: Can I put my brand on the client portal?
branding.a: Yes. On Professional you get partial branding, and on Premium full branding — your logo, your colours and your own domain.

cta_banner.title: Start today. No card. No commitment.
cta_banner.subtitle: 30 days with your real team, no credit card. If it doesn't win you over, you don't pay — and if it does, you stay.

footer.tagline: We don't sell cleanings. We sell peace of mind, trust, and the feeling of coming home to a perfect place.
footer.madeWith: Made with ♥ in Madrid · London · Lisbon

howItWorks.title: From WhatsApp and Excel to real time, in one afternoon.
howItWorks.subtitle: Nothing to install, no training, no IT team. Three steps and you're up and running.

one.title: Add your team in minutes
one.description: Load your cleaners, properties and clients from a CSV or the dashboard. Each cleaner gets a 6-digit PIN to sign in — no passwords, nothing to install.

two.title: Your cleaner works from their phone
two.description: GPS check-in on arrival, a photo of the finished job and direct messaging with you. All in real time, even offline.

three.title: You see everything from one place
three.description: Cleanings, quality, incidents, clients and properties — a single dashboard for the owner. If something goes wrong, you know instantly.

hero.sub: Run your home cleanings and Airbnb turnovers from one place — bookings, team, finish photos, ratings and client chat, in real time. Replace WhatsApp and spreadsheets.

logos.head: For home cleaning & Airbnb businesses across UK · ES · PT

portals.sub: Whether you clean homes or manage Airbnb turnovers, you get the portal and tools made for your business.

items.q: Do I need to install anything?
items.a: No. It's 100% web — works on any phone, computer or tablet. Your team opens the URL, signs in with a 6-digit PIN and that's it.

items.q: Can I import my existing data?
items.a: Yes. We have CSV importers for clients, properties and your team. In most cases we upload your data for you during onboarding.
Yes. Your cleaner can check in and upload photos even with no signal — everything syncs once they're back online.

items.q: Can I put my brand on the client portal?
items.a: Yes. Logo, colours and your own domain are included in the Premium plan. On Professional you can upload your logo.
English, Spanish and Portuguese, with local support in the UK, ES and PT.

splash.goodbye: Account deleted. Thanks for using Portal Home.

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.subtitle: Choose how you want to sign in.

login.operativeHint: Operatives sign in with a 6-digit PIN, not a password.
login.heroSubtitle: The operations hub for cleaning companies, Airbnb hosts and facility managers. Assign, supervise and bill from a single place.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to set a new password.
forgotPassword.sentMessage: If that email exists, you'll get a reset link shortly.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a password with at least 8 characters.
resetPassword.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

onboarding.step1Hint: Give it a short name (e.g. Flat 3 — Camden). You can paste the Airbnb iCal URL now to auto-create cleanings on checkout, or do it later.
onboarding.icalHint: Find it in Airbnb → Calendar → Availability settings → Sync with another calendar.
onboarding.step2Hint: We'll generate a 6-digit PIN you can share via WhatsApp. They use it to log into the operative app — no app store, no email signup.
onboarding.phoneHint: Useful if you want to send the PIN by WhatsApp later.
onboarding.doneHint: Your cleaner's login PIN is below. Share it via WhatsApp — they sign in at hq.portalservices.digital/operative/login and type the PIN.
onboarding.pinHint: You can always view or regenerate this PIN from the Cleaners page.
onboarding.btTitle: What kind of business do you run?
onboarding.btSubtitle: We'll set up your portal accordingly. You can change this later.
onboarding.btAirbnbDesc: I manage Airbnb / Booking flats and need cleanings coordinated automatically on every checkout.
onboarding.btCleaningDesc: I clean clients' homes — Regular, Deep, Move-out, End-of-tenancy.
onboarding.btCleaningB3: Reviews + public profile to attract customers
onboarding.btBothDesc: I do Airbnb cleanings AND regular house cleanings for clients.
onboarding.btBothB1: Everything from both — properties, clients, services, reviews

more.title: More
more.analyticsDesc: KPIs, completion rate, average time on site.
more.docsDesc: How to set up your first cleaning step by step.

properties.title: Properties
properties.emptyHint: Add your first one to start scheduling cleanings.
properties.name: Name
properties.cronHint: The daily cron runs at 06:00 UTC.
properties.noIcalHint: No iCal URL. Tap Edit above and paste the URL from Airbnb → Calendar.
properties.dangerHint: Deleting the property also removes every cleaning attached. Cannot be undone.
properties.newSubtitle: Give it a short, recognisable name.

cleaners.title: Cleaners
cleaners.subtitle: Share each cleaner's 6-digit PIN. Tap a row to manage · regenerate · delete.
cleaners.searchPh: Search by name, phone or email…
cleaners.emptyHint: Add your first team member to start assigning cleanings.
cleaners.regeneratedMessage: New PIN generated. Share it with {name} — the previous PIN no longer works.
cleaners.dangerHint: Deleting {name} unassigns them from any future cleanings. Past cleanings keep their record. Cannot be undone.
cleaners.newSubtitle: We'll generate a unique 6-digit PIN automatically.

tasks.title: Cleanings
tasks.subtitle: Tap a row to view, edit, cancel or delete.
tasks.emptyHint: Schedule your first one — pick a property, a cleaner, and a date.
tasks.tryAdjust: Try adjusting or clearing the filters.
tasks.noPhotoYet: No photo yet. The cleaner will upload it when finishing the cleaning.
tasks.dangerHint: Cancelling keeps the record. Deleting removes the cleaning, its check-in and photo.
tasks.newSubtitle: Pick a property and a date. The cleaner is optional — you can assign later.
tasks.notesPh: Wifi code, key location, special instructions…

analytics.title: Operational snapshot
analytics.subtitle: Last 90 days. Month-over-month figures compare to the previous calendar month.

settings.title: Account
settings.subtitle: Manage your sign-in details, plan, and data.
settings.planNone: You don't have an active subscription yet.
settings.noPlanYet: No plan yet — start your free trial.
settings.emailSubtitle: We'll send a confirmation link to your new address before the change takes effect.
settings.exportSubtitle: Download CSV files of your properties, cleaners and tasks.
settings.deleteSubtitle: Permanently erases your properties, cleaners, tasks and login. Cannot be undone.
settings.emailSentMsg: Confirmation email sent to your new address. Click the link to finish the change.

billing.title: Choose your plan
billing.subtitle: Pay monthly. Cancel anytime. 14-day free trial — no credit card charged until the trial ends.
billing.stripePriceMissing: Stripe price ID not configured yet
billing.footer: All prices in GBP. VAT not included. You can change plan or cancel anytime from the Stripe billing portal.
billing.cancelledMsg: Checkout cancelled. You can pick a plan whenever you're ready.

operative.dayCompleteHint: You've finished every cleaning on the list. The owner has been notified for each one.
operative.noAssignmentsYet: No cleanings assigned yet. Your manager will add them here.
operative.loginSubtitle: Type the 6-digit PIN your manager sent you.
operative.wrongPin: PIN not recognised. Check it with your manager.

businessProfile.title: Public business profile
businessProfile.sub: A public landing page customers can visit before booking. Add your services, photos and reviews — share the link by WhatsApp, Instagram bio, anywhere.
businessProfile.typeHint: Controls which sections show in the menu. Hidden sections are still reachable by direct URL.
businessProfile.inactiveNoName: Add a business name to generate your public URL.
businessProfile.inactiveOff: Your public profile is currently OFF — only you can see it. Toggle it on below to publish.
businessProfile.publishHint: When ON, anyone with the link can see your business page.
businessProfile.fTaglinePh: Trusted home cleaning across North London
businessProfile.fTaglineHint: One short line shown under your business name.
businessProfile.fAboutPh: Family-run since 2018. We use eco-friendly products. Fully insured. Same cleaner each visit when possible…
businessProfile.photosHint: Tap a photo to toggle whether it appears on your public page. Recommended: 6–12 best photos of completed work.
businessProfile.photosEmpty: No photos yet. Your cleaners' completion photos will appear here and you can pick the best ones for your portfolio.
businessProfile.reviewsHint: Each rating from a client. Toggle a review to publish it as a testimonial on your public page.
businessProfile.reviewsEmpty: No reviews yet. Once clients rate cleanings, you can pick which ones to show publicly.
businessProfile.tip1: Use a square logo with a clean background
businessProfile.tip2: Fill the "About us" with 2-3 short paragraphs
businessProfile.tip3: Pick 6-12 photos that show real, completed work
businessProfile.tip4: Feature your best reviews — quality over quantity
businessProfile.tip5: Share the public URL on Instagram bio, Google Business, flyers

ownerHome.bannerSubtitle: Real-time view of jobs, cleaners and map

taskNew.noProperties: You don't have any properties yet.
taskNew.noPropertiesHint: You need at least one property to create cleanings.
taskNew.whenDesc: When it happens and how long it's expected to take.
taskNew.durationHint: In hours (decimals OK: 1, 1.5, 2.5, 3…). If you set the service below, this auto-fills.
taskNew.serviceDesc: Service type and price. Manual values override the service defaults.
taskNew.serviceHint: The name and price are snapshotted now, so the history doesn't change if you later edit the service.
taskNew.paymentDesc: Record how and when this service was paid.
taskNew.notesPlaceholder: WiFi password, key location, special instructions…
taskNew.heroSubtitle: Pick the property, assign someone and log the payment — all in one screen.

welcome.subtitle: Choose how you want to enter your portal.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Your portal access is ready in seconds.
signup.pendingSubtitle: We'll review {email} and email you when your portal is ready — usually under 24 hours.
signup.pendingNote: No need to keep this tab open — everything will arrive at your inbox.

book.title: Tell us how you live and we sort the rest.
book.subtitle: Pick a service, choose your home size, add extras and lock in your time slot. Price updates as you go.

cta.footnote: You won't be charged yet — payment in next step.

errors.address_save_failed: Couldn't save the address — try again.
errors.booking_save_failed: Couldn't create the booking — try again.

success.title: Booking received
success.subtitle: We're confirming your payment. You'll see it as paid here once Stripe finishes.
success.subtitlePaid: Payment received. We'll match you with a professional and email the details.

cancel.title: Payment canceled
cancel.subtitle: Nothing was charged. Your booking is on hold — finish it whenever you're ready.
